title: ObjectMeta
description: Standard Kubernetes object metadata. Every resource includes metadata such as name, namespace, labels, and annotations.

name.description: The name of the resource, unique within a namespace.

namespace.description: The namespace in which the resource resides.

uid.description: A unique identifier for the resource set by the server.

resourceVersion.description: An opaque value representing the internal version of the object.

generation.description: A sequence number representing a specific generation of the desired state.

creationTimestamp.description: Timestamp representing when the object was created.

deletionTimestamp.description: Timestamp at which the object will be deleted.

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize objects.

annotations.description: Unstructured key-value map stored with a resource for arbitrary metadata.

ownerReferences.description: List of objects depended by this object.

finalizers.description: Must be empty before the object is deleted from the registry.
